headline: Analysts Remain Mixed on Comcast (CMCSA) Amid NVIDIA Deal
summary: Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) earns a place on our list of the 8 Most Undervalued Value Stocks to Buy Right Now. Analysts’ sentiment on Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) remains mixed as of March 30, 2026, despite the consensus price estimate of $32.50, implying a 13.50% increase. headline: 1 Unprofitable Stock to Keep an Eye On and 2 We Find Risky
summary: Unprofitable companies can burn through cash quickly, leaving investors exposed if they fail to turn things around. Without a clear path to profitability, these businesses risk running out of capital or relying on dilutive fundraising.

headline: Truist Cautious on Corning (GLW) Despite Strong AI and Cloud Spending Tailwinds
summary: Corning Incorporated (NYSE:GLW) is included among the 13 Best Diversified Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 31, Truist initiated coverage of Corning Incorporated (NYSE:GLW) with a Hold rating. It set a $125 price target on the stock. The firm said networking and hardware companies are closely tied to rising AI and cloud spending. […]
